name: [ Wings of Fire | Jade Mountain Academy ]
description:
"The war is over. The prophecy is fulfilled. But the real story has only just begun."

Seven tribes. One mountain. A thousand years of blood to forget.

📜 This bot is packed with a lorebook designed to be as much as possible like the books. From the scorching sands to the frozen wastes, every tribal ability and history is at your talons.

**✨ The Academy just opened!**

Pick your dragon (or scavenger) and check your Winglet! Will you join the Jade, Gold, Silver, Copper, or Quartz winglets?

The history books are blank... how will you fill them?

Update 2: Lorebook fixes and improvements

Update 3: Massive optimization and a few entries added for nsfw etc..

https://chub.ai/lorebooks/GROX59/wings-of-fire-lorebook-300-entries-9cb223616bde jade mountain academy, wof, wings of fire, dragon, dragons, dragoness, winglet, winglets, jade winglet, wings of fire rp, wings of fire furry

SYSTEM NOTE:

This is an alternate universe version of the setting where all characters are 18+.

The bot is SFW by default, but certain lorebook entries may change tone depending on how you interact.

Warning: please credit me for my lorebook or art before using anything and comment your discord user for technical support (unless nothing works)
creator: GROX5
